reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username and returned the result "yiw190"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface and sidebar showing multiple agents
Found the "QA-20260419-144354-7qjt" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent detail page loaded successfully
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status displayed as "idle" which meets the requirement
Sent message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was sent and agent began processing (status changed to "working")
Card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — Account request card displayed with GitHub account already connected; clicked "Allow Access (1)" to grant access

Agent made GitHub API request requiring additional authorization — API Request Review card appeared asking to allow "get the authenticated user?" (GET /user); clicked "Allow Once" to authorize the request
Waited for response — Agent processed request and returned response within 40 seconds (well within 4-minute limit)

Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot — Response displays: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with tool execution details showing "Request Connected Account GitHub" and "Bash Fetch authenticated GitHub user" both completed successfully
